rationale: Both evaluations give the identical score (3/10) and the same verbatim justification, cite the same missing qualifications (C/UNIX embedded, Linux kernel, MACsec/802.1X, Japanese), and credit the same strengths. The only differences are cosmetic rewordings and the choice of which concrete examples to name (GISCollective/CI-CD vs. DLang/real-time) — ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the name change.
